item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.

item.title: Bill Gates on His Meeting With Trump, Musk's DOGE, His Childhood
item.description: The billionaire spoke with The Wall Street Journal ahead of his coming book, “Source Code.”

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Find insight on Quebecor, Verizon, Texas Instruments and more in the latest Market Talks covering technology, media and telecom.

item.title: Meta Spending to Soar on AI, Massive Data Center
item.description: The social-media giant plans to spend between $60 billion and $65 billion, the latest sign of tech companies’ accelerating investments into artificial intelligence.

item.title: Canada to Review Amazon Contracts After Quebec Layoffs
item.description: Canada has warned Amazon.com that it is reviewing business ties with the company’s cloud-computing unit following Amazon’s decision to shut down its warehouses in Quebec, leading to the layoff of 1,700 workers.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Find insight on Electronic Arts, consumer spending on videogames, Meta and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Nvidia Supplier SK Hynix Posts Record Profit on AI Boom
item.description: The South Korean memory-chip maker reported record quarterly and annual results after stronger-than-expected earnings for the final quarter of 2024 on robust chip demand.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Find insight on Netflix, U.S. advertising spending, AI joint venture Stargate and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Tech Leaders Pledge Up to $500 Billion in AI Investment in U.S.
item.description: OpenAI, Oracle and SoftBank unveiled AI infrastructure plans at White House.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Find insight on diversified semiconductor vendors, Netflix, potential Canadian tariffs, and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: China Signals It Is Open to a Deal Keeping TikTok in U.S.
item.description: The founder of the app’s parent, Beijing-based ByteDance, met with Elon Musk last year.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Find insight on Tencent, TikTok, Reach and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: TikTok Restoring Service for U.S. Users, After Trump Signals He Will Save It
item.description: The president-elect said he will issue an executive order, and the app said it will work on a long-term solution with the incoming administration.

item.title: How People Actually Make a Living on TikTok
item.description: The platform has provided a surge in discovery and revenue for companies that may not be able to replicate it elsewhere.

item.title: What Happens Now That TikTok's Gone Dark?
item.description: The company told users the app isn’t available and told them to stay tuned. Trump said he will likely intervene.

item.title: How a Little-Known Finnish Company Became One of the World's Hottest Gadget Startups
item.description: Oura’s smart ring measures heart health and can predict when you may be getting sick
